description: S44D - Premium Animations (Apple Style): Create MioAnimations utility class, add spring/fade/slide animations to chat bubbles, sidebar, route transitions, loading indicator dots, and settings tiles
steps: Create frontend/lib/core/utils/animations.dart with MioAnimations class: static const Duration standard = Duration(milliseconds: 300), static const Duration fast = Duration(milliseconds: 200), static const Curve curve = Curves.easeOutCubic, static const SpringDescription spring = SpringDescription(mass: 1, stiffness: 300, damping: 20). Import physics package for SpringDescription.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/chat_bubble.dart: The existing _fadeController already does a FadeTransition. Add a SlideTransition from bottom 20px (Offset(0, 0.1) -> Offset.zero) combined with the existing fade. Use MioAnimations.standard duration and MioAnimations.curve. Trigger on first build only (already done via initState forward).

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/sidebar/sidebar_widget.dart: The sidebar already has a slide animation from left. Update the curve to use Curves.easeOutCubic and duration to 300ms to match MioAnimations.standard. The Tween is already Offset(-1,0) -> Offset.zero which is correct.

Update frontend/lib/core/utils/router.dart: Replace all GoRoute builder with pageBuilder using CustomTransitionPage. transitionDuration: MioAnimations.standard. transitionsBuilder: SlideTransition from right (Offset(1,0) -> Offset.zero) with MioAnimations.curve. Pop is automatic reverse. Import MioAnimations.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/loading_indicator.dart: Add pulse scale animation to the dots. Each dot gets a ScaleTransition 0.6 -> 1.0 -> 0.6 loop. Stagger: dot 1 starts at 0ms, dot 2 at 150ms, dot 3 at 300ms. Use existing _dot1Controller/_dot2Controller/_dot3Controller but add scale animations alongside the existing translate animations.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/settings_screen.dart: Wrap each settings tile (the InkWell in _buildTile) with a GestureDetector + AnimatedScale that scales to 0.97 on tap down and back to 1.0 on tap up/cancel, using MioAnimations.fast duration. This provides the spring-like tap feedback.
Run flutter analyze and fix any warnings or errors in all modified files.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/lib/core/utils/animations.dart exists with MioAnimations class and all constants
chat_bubble.dart has combined FadeTransition + SlideTransition from bottom
sidebar_widget.dart uses easeOutCubic curve and 300ms duration
router.dart uses CustomTransitionPage with slide transitions on all routes
loading_indicator.dart dots have scale pulse animation with stagger
flutter analyze passes with no errors
verification: Run: cd frontend && flutter pub get && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos
